name: Kayaking
overview: Kayaking has become one of the fastest-growing paddlesports in the United States. An estimated nine million Americans enjoy this sport. The most popular style of kayaking is recreational kayaking, followed by touring/sea kayaking, and whitewater kayaking. This merit badge will introduce you to recreational kayaking and help prepare you for advanced paddlesports such as tour/sea and whitewater kayaking.

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain to your counselor the hazards you are most likely to encounter while participating in kayaking activities, including weather and water-related hazards, and what you should do to anticipate, help prevent, mitigate, and respond to these hazards.

content.value: Explain to your counselor the hazards you are most likely to encounter while participating in kayaking activities, including weather and water-related hazards, and what you should do to anticipate, help prevent, mitigate, and respond to these hazards.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Review prevention, symptoms, and first-aid treatment for the following injuries or illnesses that can occur while kayaking: blisters, cold-water shock and hypothermia, heat-related illnesses, dehydration, sunburn, sprains, and strains.

content.value: Review prevention, symptoms, and first-aid treatment for the following injuries or illnesses that can occur while kayaking: blisters, cold-water shock and hypothermia, heat-related illnesses, dehydration, sunburn, sprains, and strains.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Review the Scouting America Safety Afloat policy. Explain to your counselor how this applies to kayaking.

content.value: Review the Scouting America Safety Afloat policy. Explain to your counselor how this applies to kayaking.

requirements.text:
Before doing requirements 3 through 8, successfully complete the Scouting America swimmer test.
Note: See the Swimming merit badge pamphlet for details about the Scouting America swimmer test.

content.value: Before doing requirements 3 through 8, successfully complete the Scouting America swimmer test.
See the
merit badge pamphlet for details about the Scouting America swimmer test.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Review the characteristics of life jackets most appropriate for kayaking and understand why one must always be worn while paddling. Then demonstrate how to select and fit a life jacket for kayaking.

content.value: Review the characteristics of life jackets most appropriate for kayaking and understand why one must always be worn while paddling. Then demonstrate how to select and fit a life jacket for kayaking.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Review the importance of safety equipment such as a signal device, extra paddle, sponge, bilge pump, flotation bags, and throw bag.

content.value: Review the importance of safety equipment such as a signal device, extra paddle, sponge, bilge pump, flotation bags, and throw bag.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Name and point out the major parts of a kayak.

content.value: Name and point out the major parts of a kayak.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Review the differences in the design between recreational, whitewater, and sea or touring kayaks. Include how length, width, stability, and rocker are involved in the design of each type.

content.value: Review the differences in the design between recreational, whitewater, and sea or touring kayaks. Include how length, width, stability, and rocker are involved in the design of each type.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Explain the care, maintenance, and storage of a kayak.

content.value: Explain the care, maintenance, and storage of a kayak.
Discuss the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Correct methods for the use of a kayak paddle

content.value: Correct methods for the use of a kayak paddle

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Parts of a paddle

content.value: Parts of a paddle

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: The care and maintenance of a paddle

content.value: The care and maintenance of a paddle

requirements.text: Using a properly equipped kayak with an open cockpit, a sit-on-top, or an inflatable kayak, do the following:

content.value: Using a properly equipped kayak with an open cockpit, a sit-on-top, or an inflatable kayak, do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Safely capsize and perform a wet exit.

content.value: Safely capsize and perform a wet exit.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Reenter the kayak with assistance from a buddy boat.

content.value: Reenter the kayak with assistance from a buddy boat.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Demonstrate a kayak-over-kayak rescue.

content.value: Demonstrate a kayak-over-kayak rescue.

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Demonstrate the HELP position.

content.value: Demonstrate the HELP position.

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Capsize the kayak, swim it and the paddle to shore, and empty water from the kayak with assistance if needed.

content.value: Capsize the kayak, swim it and the paddle to shore, and empty water from the kayak with assistance if needed.

requirements.text: As a solo paddler, use a properly equipped kayak to demonstrate the following:

content.value: As a solo paddler, use a properly equipped kayak to demonstrate the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Forward stroke

content.value: Forward stroke

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Backstroke

content.value: Backstroke

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Forward sweep

content.value: Forward sweep

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Reverse sweep

content.value: Reverse sweep

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Draw stroke

content.value: Draw stroke

sub_requirements.label: f
sub_requirements.text: Stern draw

content.value: Stern draw

requirements.text: As a solo paddler, use a properly equipped kayak to demonstrate the following:

content.value: As a solo paddler, use a properly equipped kayak to demonstrate the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Paddle a straight line for 15 to 20 boat lengths using appropriate strokes while maintaining trim and balance of the kayak.

content.value: Paddle a straight line for 15 to 20 boat lengths using appropriate strokes while maintaining trim and balance of the kayak.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Spin or pivot from a stationary position 180 degrees (half circle) to the right and left within two boat lengths.

content.value: Spin or pivot from a stationary position 180 degrees (half circle) to the right and left within two boat lengths.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Move abeam to the right 10 feet and to the left 10 feet.

content.value: Move abeam to the right 10 feet and to the left 10 feet.

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Stop the boat in one boat length.

content.value: Stop the boat in one boat length.

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: While maintaining forward motion, turn the kayak 90 degrees to the right and left.

content.value: While maintaining forward motion, turn the kayak 90 degrees to the right and left.

sub_requirements.label: f
sub_requirements.text: Move the kayak backward three to four boat lengths using appropriate and effective reverse strokes.

content.value: Move the kayak backward three to four boat lengths using appropriate and effective reverse strokes.

sub_requirements.label: g
sub_requirements.text: Paddle the kayak in a buoyed figure 8 course around markers three to four boat lengths apart.

content.value: Paddle the kayak in a buoyed figure 8 course around markers three to four boat lengths apart.
